title: Dimarts as Migjorn (Es Migjorn Gran Night Market)
description: The small village of Es Migjorn Gran brings its streets to life on Tuesday evenings in summer (roughly 19:30 to 22:30) with the Dimarts as Migjorn market, of crafts and local produce, between June and August. A quiet, authentic village affair. Exact 2026 dates to be confirmed with the town council.
